description: CE migration adds nullable columns inbound_paused_at (timestamptz) and inbound_pause_reason (text: 'manual'|'tenant_cancelled') to email_providers
EmailProvider TypeScript types/DTOs (EmailProviderService, packages/integrations email types) expose inboundPausedAt and inboundPauseReason
Microsoft webhook handler provider lookup filters on is_active = true (parity with Google/IMAP)
Microsoft webhook handler skips enqueue (acks 202, debug log) when provider is paused (inbound_paused_at not null)
Google webhook handler additionally requires inbound_paused_at IS NULL before enqueueing
IMAP webhook handler additionally requires inbound_paused_at IS NULL before enqueueing (skip response with reason)
Unified queue consumer job processor re-checks is_active && !paused in all three provider-config fetch paths (Microsoft, Google, IMAP) and skips gated jobs
Consumer gated-skip completes the job successfully: no ticket, no DLQ entry, no failed email_processed_messages row
GmailAdapter implements watch stop via Gmail users.stop; GmailWebhookService TODO replaced with real call
MicrosoftGraphAdapter exposes a deleteSubscription operation callable outside renewal, keyed by stored webhook_subscription_id
EmailProviderService.pauseProvider(id, reason) sets pause columns, best-effort external teardown (Graph delete / Gmail stop), clears webhook_subscription_id/webhook_expires_at/watch_expiration
pauseProvider commits the pause even when external teardown fails (warning logged); DB gate guarantees inertness
EmailProviderService.resumeProvider(id) clears pause columns and re-registers webhook/watch via initializeProviderWebhook for webhook-mode providers
resumeProvider failure to re-register leaves provider resumed but sets status='error' with error_message surfaced in UI
EmailProviderService.deleteProvider performs external subscription teardown before deleting config rows
Microsoft webhook maintenance candidate query excludes paused providers (inbound_paused_at IS NULL)
Gmail watch renewal job candidate query excludes paused providers
EmailWebhookMaintenanceService silent-run detection and subscription probes skip paused providers
Pause/resume API endpoints or server actions with same auth/permission model as existing provider mutations
Email provider settings UI shows Paused badge and Pause/Resume action per provider (kebab-case ids, i18n keys)
UI helper copy explains that mail received while paused is not imported retroactively (i18n)
New Temporal activity suspendTenantEmailIngestion(tenantId) pauses all active, unpaused providers with reason 'tenant_cancelled'; idempotent; per-provider errors isolated; never workflow-fatal
tenantDeletionWorkflow invokes suspendTenantEmailIngestion immediately after deactivateAllTenantUsers for all trigger sources
New Temporal activity resumeTenantEmailIngestion(tenantId) resumes only providers with inbound_pause_reason='tenant_cancelled'
Rollback/reactivation path invokes resumeTenantEmailIngestion; re-registration failures set status='error' and never fail reactivation
Final-deletion phase runs external subscription teardown for remaining providers before email tables are deleted (idempotent)
All new activity invocations in tenantDeletionWorkflow are guarded with Temporal patched() so in-flight workflows replay without non-determinism errors
Backfill script/admin endpoint suspends email ingestion for all tenants in pending_tenant_deletions (status pending/awaiting_confirmation/confirmed); rerunnable no-op
All new DB queries and updates include tenant in WHERE clauses and JOIN conditions (Citus rules)
